invalidDomain.title: Invalid domain
invalidDomain.description: The provided domain is not a valid normalized Namefi domain.
invalidDomain.hint: Make sure you are using a fully normalized domain, e.g. "alice.0x.city".

ineligibleBanner.title: This domain is not eligible for a free claim.
ineligibleBanner.description: You can add it to your cart to purchase, or go back to search.

summary.duration: Duration: {count, plural, one {# year} other {# years}} • Free

widget.defaultSubtitle: Become part of the Web3 citizen network
widget.qualifyPrompt: Follow the steps below to see if you qualify

signIn.signedIn: Thanks for signing in! You can proceed to the next step.
signIn.signedOut: Sign in or create an account to get started.

linkSocial.description: Link a social media account with a qualifying username by visiting your profile page. For now, usernames that start with "0x" qualify you for the promo.

enterDomain.description: Enter your qualifying domain name below. If it's available, you'll be able to claim it for free!

qualifying.checking: Checking for qualifying domains based on your linked social media accounts...
qualifying.error: Error while checking for qualifying domains based on your linked social media accounts.
qualifying.none: It looks like your linked social media accounts don't qualify you to claim a free domain name.
